publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Mazmura Dāwit
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 1r፩
ተግሣጽ፡ ለኵሉ።
ፍካሬ፡ ዘጻድቃን፡ ወዘኃጥኣን።
መዝሙር፡ ዘዳዊት።
ብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘኢሖረ፡ በምክረ፡ ረሲዓን።
ወዘኢቆመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ኃጥኣን፨
ወዘኢነበረ፡ ውስተ፡ መንበረ፡ መስተሳልቃን፨
msItem.explicit:
Fol. 148v አኃውየሰ፡ ሠናያን፡ ወልሒቃን፨
ወኢሠምረ፡ ቦሙ፡ እግዚአብሔር፨
ወወፃስኩ፡ ለትእኅዞቱ፡ ለሕዝብ፡ ነኪር፨
ወረገመኒ፡ በአማልክቲሁ፡ ርኩሳን፨
ወአንሰ፡ ነሣእኩ፡ ዘእምላዕሌሁ፡ ሰይፈ። ወመተርኩ፡ ርእሶ፡ ለጎልድድ፤
ወአሰሰልኩ፡ ጽእለተ፡ እምደቂቀ፡ እስራኤል፨

msItem.title: Maḥālǝya nabiyāt
msItem.incipit:
መኃልየ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወጸሎቱ፡ ለሙሴ፡ ንሴብሖ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ስ
ፈረስ፡ ወመስተፅዕነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፨

msItem.title: The Prayer of Moses
msItem.incipit:
ንሴብሖ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ስ
ፈረስ፡ ወመስተፅዕነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፨

msItem.title: The Prayer of Hannah, mother of Samuel the Prophet
The Prayer of Hezekiah, King of Judah
Third Song of the Three Youths in the Furnace
Now you dismiss
msItem.explicit:
Fol. 164r
ዘአስተዳሎከ፡ ቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሕዝብከ፨
ስመ፡ ትክሥት፡ ብርሃነ፡ ለአሕዛብ፨
ወክብረ፡ ለሕዝነብከ፡ እስራኤል፨

msItem.title: Song of Songs
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 164r
መኃልየ፡ መኃልይ፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ዘሰሎሞን።
፩ ይስዕመኒ፡ በስዕመተ፡ አፉሁ።
አዳም፡ አጥባትኪ፡ እምወይን፨
ወመዓዙ፡ ዕፍረትኪ፡ እምኵሉ፡ አፈው፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይ፡ ነበብ፡ በዕ፡ ሰኑይ፡ ፈቀደ፡ እግዚእ፡ ያግዕዞ፡ ለአዳም፡ ኅዙነ፡ ወትኩዘ፡ ልብ፡

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām for Monday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ዘይ፡ነበብ፡ በዕ፡ ሰኑይ፡ ፈቀደ፡ እግዚእ፡ ያግዕዞ፡ ለአዳም፡ ኅዙነ፡ ወትኩዘ፡ ልብ፡

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, Hymn to Our Lady Mary

msItem.explicit: Fols 186va–186vb አንቲ፡ በአማን፡ ምክሐ፡ ዘመድነ፡ ወሰአሊት፡ ሕይወተ፡ ወነፍሳቲነ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ያጽንዓነ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ውስተ፡ አማነ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ይጸግወነ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ወምሕረቶ፡ ይሥረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡ ምሕረቱ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ቅድስት፨

msItem.title: ʾAnqaṣa bǝrhān
msItem.incipit:
Fol. 186vbውዳሴ፡ ወግናይ፡ እሙ፡ ለአዶናይ፡ ቅድስት፡ ወብፅዕት፡ ስብሕት፡ ወቡርክት፡ ክብርት፡ ወልዕልት፡
አንቀጸ፡ ብርሃን፡ መዓርገ፡ ሕይወት፡
msItem.explicit:
Fols 192vb–193ra ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ያጽንዓነ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይ
ማኖት፡ ውስተ፡ አሚነ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ወዘአቡሁ፡ ወዘቅዱስ፡ መንፈሱ፡ ይፀግወነ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ወምሕረቶ፡ ይሥረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡ ምሕረቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለኪ፡ ኦወላዲተ፡ እግዚአ፡ ኵሉ፡ አኰቴት፡ ወክብር፡ ለአብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወልድኪ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ይክፍለነ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ቅድስት፨ ፨ ፨

list.item: Fols ir–194v Foliation in pencil in the middle bottom margin of the recto. This foliation is used as reference in this description.
Fols 1r–196v Foliation with Eastern Arabic numerals in pencil in the lower right corner of the recto, from ١ on ir to ١٩٦ on 194v.
2 Fols ir–iiv 1, stub before 2 2, stub before 1

supportDesc.condition: The manuscript shows slight traces of use, the lower part of most leaves is slightly stained by dirt. Fols. 116, and 117 have been cut at the bottom.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 46r.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 186r.

handNote.desc: Careful but not very regular; by a mediocre scribe.

decoNote.desc: Unfinished ornamental bands with crosses, interlaces, geometric and floral motifs and lateral pendants.
Drawings of two crosses on each of the folia.

A European printed devotional image is glued on the folium, depicting St Mary with Child, with a quote in Latin (S. of S. 2:16) ‘Dilectus meus mihi et ego illi qui pascitur inter lilia (Cant. 2-16).’ Legends in Ethiopic, in a crude hand, are added above the image, ምስለ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልዳ፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ and in the upper part of the image ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡. A note in the bottom part mentions ʾIsāyǝyyās: ተማሕፀን፡ ለገብርኪ፡ ኢሳይያስ. Three crosses have been drawn in the upper part of the image.

ثَمَّة صورة تعبّدية طباعية أوروبية مُلصَقة على الورقة، تصوّر القديسة مريم مع الطفل، مع اقتباس باللاتينية (نشيد 2: 16) ‘Dilectus meus mihi et ego illi qui pascitur inter lilia’ ضاف فوق الصورة هذه العناوين بالأثيوبية، بخطّ غير مُتقَن: ምስለ፡ ፍቁር፡ ወልዳ፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ وفي الجزء العلوي من الصورة ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ. ثَمَّة مذكرة في الجزء السفلي تذكر إسايِيّاس ተማሕፀን፡ ለገብርኪ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡. وقد تم رسم ثلاثة صلبان في الجزء العلوي من الصورة.

item.desc: Arabic note describing the content of the manuscript and stating that it was donated by Gabra Māryām to Dayr as-Suryān in 1951.
item.q:
كتاب يحوي ال ١٥٠ مزمورا + صلوات سليمان السبعة + طلبات العذرى باللغة الجئز
هدية من القمص عبد مريم الحبشي السرياني الأحد الثالث من كيهك ١٦٦٨ ٢٢ ديسمبر ١٩٥١
وقف دير السريان

item.desc: Prayer with ʾasmāt and some Amharic words, mentioning Hayla Gabrǝʾel. The larger part of the text on fol. iv is erased. Written in a crude hand with many mistakes, poorly readable.

q.seg:
በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ፩አም
ተዋደድ፡ ፍቀሩ፡ ምስለ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ክርስቲያን፡ አብይ፡ ወንዑስ፡ ልሂቅ፡ ወሸማግሌ፡ ንጐሥ፡ ወመኵንን፡ ኤበናቶ፡ ወእጓለመውቴ፡ ወይዘሮ፡

item.desc: Recent donation note in Ethiopic and Arabic, written in a crude hand, stating that the manuscript was donated to Dayr as-Suryān by Gabra Māryām of Māḫbara Śǝllāse in 1944 EC (=1951/1952 CE) .
item.q:
ዝዳዊት፡ ዘአባ፡ ገብረማርያም
وقف دير السريان من القمص عبد مريم الحبشي
ዘማኅበረ፡ ሥላሴ፡ ዘወሐቦ፡ ለደብረ፡ ሶርያን፡ አስቍጢስ፡ አባ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡ ፲፱፵፬ዓ፡

item.desc: Arabic note stating that the manuscript belongs to ʿAbd aṯ-Ṯālūṯ. Written in very large characters.
item.q: يخص هذا الكتاب القمص عبد الثالوث
This book belongs to the head priest ʿAbd aṯ-Ṯālūṯ.

item.desc: Note in Arabic and Ethiopic containing only the name of ʿAbd aṯ-Ṯālūṯ, respectively Gabra Śǝllāse, with the names of the monasteries of Baramūs in the Arabic and Dabra Bizan in the Ethiopic part.

q.hi: አባ፡ ገብረ፡ ሥላሴ፡ ደብረ፡ ቢዘን፡ ቅድስት፡

item.desc: Note in Arabic stating that the manuscript is made of gazelle leather.
item.q: هذا الكتاب مصنوع من جلد الغزال
This book is made of gazelle leather.

item.desc: The omitted verse, Ps. 142:12, is added in the upper margin, its place in the text is marked by a tamallas-sign (tie-mark).

The omitted verse, Isa. 38:12, is added in the upper margin, in pencil and in ink, in two different hands;
the place in the text is marked by a tamallas-sign (tie-mark). Correction in the same hand as Additional note 5.
The omitted verse from Text I-5 (‘Praise of Mary’), for Tuesday is added in the upper margin, the place is marked by two tamallas-signs (tie-marks).
Supplication note for Gabra Śǝllāse.
item.q: ተማሕፀንኩ፡ አነ፡ ገብርኪ፡ ገብረ፡ ሥላሴ፡ ቢዘን፡ ኦእግዚእትየ፡ ቅድስት፡ ማርያም፡ ድንግል፡ ወላዲተ፡ ወላዲተ፡ መለኮት፡ ዘውእቱ፡ አበ፡ ብርሃናትን።

item.desc: Short notes consisting mainly of the name of (Hayla) Gabrǝʾel, written in an unskilled hand, with many errors.
Written in a crude hand in the upper margin.
Note in the hand of Hayla Gabrǝʾel.
Supplication to St Mary and Solomon, written in the hand of Hayla Gabrǝʾel.
Stamp of Dayr as-Suryān.
Erased note.
Erased note.
Arabic shelfmark.
Arabic shelfmark.
Arabic title and shelfmark.
Arabic shelfmark written both with a pen on the spine and on a piece of paper glued to the spine.

binding.decoNote: Ethiopian. Two wooden boards covered with light brown blind-tooled leather. Blind-tooled mitred turn-ins, textile inlays. Leather patches covering the lacing holes. Two pairs of sewing stations. The endbands intact.

history.origin: أواخر القرن التاسع عشر / أوائل القرن العشرين The manuscript can be dated palaeographically to the late nineteenth/early twentieth century.
history.provenance: It passed through the hands of several owners: Hayla Gabrǝʾel, Gabra Śǝllāse/ʿAbd aṯ-Ṯālūṯ of Dabra Bizan and Dayr al-Baramūs, possibly ʾIsāyǝyyās, and finally Gabra Māryām/ʿAbd Maryam of Māḫbara Śǝllāse, who donated it to Dayr as-Suryān in 1951.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Dorothea Reule: Continued description and revision
Denis Nosnitsin: Continued description and revision
